text:
Firm: Goldsmith & Co.
Analyst: Dana Reyes
Date: February 12, 2021
---
We are initiating coverage of ASTR with a BUY rating. Momentum in the core franchise is accelerating and we think the Street is too conservative. Our 12-month price target of $95.00 implies meaningful upside from current levels.

Firm: Harbor Point Securities
Analyst: Marcus Vale
Date: March 3, 2021
---
Following a strong quarter and improving margins, we are upgrading EVRG to Overweight from Equal Weight. Our 6-month price objective moves to $102.50; we would be buyers on any pullback.

Firm: Sterling Cross Research
Analyst: Priya Anand
Date: April 20, 2021
---
We are downgrading DRNE to a Sell. Deteriorating unit economics and a stretched balance sheet leave little room for error. Our 12-month target of $18.00 reflects further downside as estimates reset.

Firm: Cobalt Lane Capital
Analyst: Tom Becker
Date: June 1, 2021
---
We maintain a Hold (Neutral) on HELX. The risk/reward looks balanced here after the recent run. Our near-term 3-month fair value estimate is $205.00; we'd look for a better entry point before adding.

Firm: Ridgeway Partners
Analyst: Lena Cho
Date: July 15, 2021
---
We initiate IONX at Underweight given valuation concerns and decelerating bookings. While the story is exciting, the multiple already discounts a lot. Our 6-month price target is $33.25.
